title: Single Cell Isolation Using Optical Tweezers.
author: Keloth A Anderson O Risbridger D Paterson L
content: S-EPMC6187562 PMC6187562 Single Cell Isolation Using Optical Tweezers. Optical tweezers offer a non-contact method for selecting single cells and translocating them from one microenvironment to another. We have characterized the optical tweezing of yeast S. cerevisiae and can manipulate single
